allow: Bash(git remote set-url origin git@github.com:alexandraabates/recursive.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1)
Bash(git add . && git commit -m "update text" && git push 2>&1)

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
various font and layout updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)
